# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent {
        label 'master'
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                // Build code using a chosen build tool (e.g., Maven, Gradle)
                sh 'mvn clean install'  // example for Maven
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                // Run tests using a chosen testing framework (e.g., JUnit, TestNG)
                sh './test/unit-tests.sh'  // example for shell script tests
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                branch 'master'
            }

            steps {
                // Deploy to production using a chosen deployment method (e.g., SCP, Rsync)
                sh './scripts/deploy-to-production.sh'  // example for shell script deployments
            }
        }
    }
}
